description: Required and sport-specific fields for reliable rank, edge, and probability reads per pipeline.

excluded_extra.calibration_bucket: v1 — too few graded rows; excluded from offline calibration fit.
v1 — too few graded rows; excluded from offline calibration fit.

blocked_extra.distribution_std: Blocked pending step8 NHL game-log export (G1–G10); confidence_score uses std_norm=0.5 neutral for NHL rows.
blocked_extra.confidence_score: Provisional until NHL distribution_std is wired from step8 game-log export; std_norm=0.5 neutral compresses NHL confidence (re-check Tier 3c weights after export).

provisional_extra.calibration_bucket: Fitted with 5 equal-width bins on borderline sample; re-check ECE after game-log export and larger graded window.

excluded_extra.calibration_bucket: Excluded v1 — read prob structural mismatch (ECE ~0.31); re-fit after Soccer pipeline read prob improvements.

blocked_extra.distribution_std: Blocked pending Tennis step8 game-log export (G1–G10); confidence_score uses std_norm=0.5 neutral until stat_g columns are on the board.
blocked_extra.std_norm: Neutral 0.5 when distribution_std is missing; do not treat Tennis confidence_score as variance-adjusted until game-log export is wired.
blocked_extra.confidence_score: Provisional until Tennis distribution_std is wired from step8 game-log export; std_norm=0.5 neutral compresses Tennis confidence (re-check Tier 3c calibration after export).

provisional_extra.calibration_bucket: Optional until Tennis volume in retrain_dataset; sparse game-log fill for distribution_std.
